name: Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, sift together flour, 1/3 cup yellow cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Stir together beaten egg, milk, and cooking oil.
4. Add all at once to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
5. Line four 6-oz custard cups with paper baking cups.
6. Fill each cup about 2/3 full.
7. Sprinkle a little additional cornmeal atop each muffin.
8. Cook on 100% power for approximately 1 1/2 minutes, or until done. Check twice by inserting a wooden pick near the center; it should come out clean when finished.
